title: hebe hectorii subsp. laingii
intro: Hebe hectorii subsp. laingii is a plant species of the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as a New Zealand native herb. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hebe hectorii subsp. laingii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Hebe hectorii subsp. laingii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the leaves in hot water or a solvent to extract its medicinal properties.
